aiInsight.title: AI Insight
aiInsight.description: Based on your recent lifts, try increasing your protein intake by 15g today for optimal recovery.

workoutCompleted.title: Workout Completed!
workoutCompleted.description: Great job crushing {{workoutName}}. You burned {{calories}} kcal.

kudosReceived.title: Kudos Received
kudosReceived.description: {{name}} and {{count}} others liked your recent milestone: "{{milestone}}"

weeklyReport.title: Weekly Report Ready
weeklyReport.description: Your progress report for last week is available. Check your stats.

workoutReminderMorning.title: Workout Reminder
workoutReminderMorning.body: Ready to crush your {{workoutName}} workout today??

nutritionOverview.title: Daily Nutrition Overview
nutritionOverview.body: Check how your nutrition aligned with your goals today!

nutritionCheckin.title: Weekly Progress Check-in
nutritionCheckin.body: It's time for your weekly nutrition check-in! Let's see how you've done.

periodPrediction.title: Period Prediction
periodPrediction.body: Your period is predicted to start in 2 days. Get ready!

fertileWindow.title: Fertile Window
fertileWindow.body: Your fertile window is starting! Useful for tracking your energy levels.

restTimerAlert.title: Rest Over - Back to Work!
restTimerAlert.body: Your rest period is up. Time to crush the next set!

workoutDurationWarning.title: Still Working Out?
workoutDurationWarning.body: Your session has been running for 5 hours. Don't forget to finish it in Musclog!
